india_trends.title: Adani Ports among 4 stocks that hit 52-week highs & rallied up to 40% in a month
india_trends.summary: The Indian stock market saw a dip on Thursday with the Sensex falling. However, this did not stop four stocks from the BSE 200 index from reaching their highest levels in a year. These companies, including Lloyds Metals & Energy and Hitachi Energy India, showed strong upward movement.

india_trends.title: Broker’s Call: Mankind Pharma (Buy)
india_trends.summary: Motilal Oswal Research

india_trends.title: Hindustan Labs, RK Steel get Sebi nod to launch IPOs
india_trends.summary: Hindustan Laboratories has received Sebi's observations, a crucial step towards its IPO, which includes a fresh issue and an offer for sale. The company plans to use the proceeds for working capital and general corporate needs. RK Steel Manufacturing also received regulatory approval for its issue.

india_trends.title: Karnataka plans excise policy that aims to cut alcoholic beverages consumption by 8-9% over six years
india_trends.summary: Karnataka has released a draft excise policy proposing to cut alcohol consumption by 8–9% over six years, while shifting towards lower-strength beverages and improving compliance. The draft, unveiled by Chief Minister Siddaramaiah, suggests strength-based taxation, digital tracking of supply chains,

india_trends.title: Multibagger stock hits record high, logs 10% intraday gain after Q4 results 2026
india_trends.summary: Mangalam Worldwide shares rose 9.33% to ₹351, driven by strong Q4 FY26 results. Net profit surged to ₹15.38 crore, while revenue from operations was ₹264.95 crore. The company declared a final dividend of ₹0.30 per share and plans a direct listing on BSE.

india_trends.title: IPO-bound Bagmane Reit eyes acquisitions, bets on strong GCC demand
india_trends.summary: The ₹3,405-crore share sale will fund new asset purchases as the firm targets a growing pool of global corporate tenants, CEO Richard Hugh Andrew told Mint.

india_trends.title: Eveready Ind posts 9.4% jump in revenue growth in March quarter
india_trends.summary: Profit after tax for Q4 stood higher at ₹141.8 crore

india_trends.title: Equitas Small Finance Bank Q4 profit soars 5-fold on expansion, asset quality
india_trends.summary: Equitas Small Finance Bank's net profit surged five times to Rs 213 crore in the fourth quarter. This growth was fueled by expanded business and better asset quality. Provisions also decreased significantly. The bank saw its net interest margin improve. Gross advances grew by 22 percent year-on-year

india_trends.title: Wall Street: S&P 500, Nasdaq rise on strong corporate earnings
india_trends.summary: The S&amp;P 500 rose 0.36%, the Nasdaq Composite surged 0.76%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.20%

india_trends.title: SEBI introduces fast-track route for AIF placement memorandum
india_trends.summary: Non-LVF schemes can launch funds 30 days after filing; merchant bankers, managers bear disclosure responsibility

india_trends.title: Aster DM Healthcare Q4 revenue jumps 18% YoY to Rs 1,182 crore
india_trends.summary: Aster DM Healthcare reported an 18% year-on-year revenue increase in Q4 to Rs 1,182 crore, with operating EBITDA up 31%. The company is on track to complete its merger with Quality Care India Ltd in Q1 FY27, creating a combined entity with over 10,600 beds.

india_trends.title: US stocks today-S&P 500, Nasdaq open higher as earnings optimism overshadows Middle East woes
india_trends.summary: Major US stock indices opened mixed on Thursday, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq climbing on the back of robust earnings reports. Despite positive corporate results, investor sentiment was tempered by growing concerns over potential escalation of the Middle East conflict, which weighed on the Dow Jo

india_trends.title: Hindustan Laboratories, RK Steel get SEBI nod for IPOs
india_trends.summary: Both companies had filed their draft papers in September and received SEBI’s observations on April 27, which effectively clears them to proceed.

india_trends.title: Value 360 Communications IPO: Rs 41.7 crore issue opens May 4. Check price band, GMP, other details
india_trends.summary: Value 360 Communications Limited's IPO opens May 4th, aiming to raise Rs 41.69 crore by May 6th. The public relations firm plans to list on NSE Emerge, using funds for expansion, technology, influencer marketing investment, and potential acquisitions. Proceeds will also cover debt repayment and work

india_trends.title: Alphabet jumps, Meta tumbles: US Big Tech stocks trade mixed in premarket after earnings, AI spending bets
india_trends.summary: US tech giants Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, and Microsoft showed mixed premarket trading as investors analyzed their earnings and AI spending. Alphabet rose 7%, Amazon gained, while Microsoft dipped and Meta fell 8% amid spending concerns and a decline in user activity.

india_trends.title: Stock market today (April 30, 2026): Sensex drops 583 points, Nifty slips below 24,000; check top gainers and losers list? - India IPO
india_trends.summary: Stock market today (April 30, 2026): Sensex drops 583 points, Nifty slips below 24,000; check top gainers and losers list?    India IPO

india_trends.title: Sebi introduces fast-track route for AIF launches to boost capital deployment
india_trends.summary: Sebi has introduced a fast-track mechanism for Alternative Investment Funds (AIFs), allowing non-LVF schemes to launch in just 30 days after application. This streamlines fund launches and accelerates capital deployment. Earlier, Sebi also simplified the accredited investor framework, easing operati

india_trends.title: India used car market expected to double to $70 billion in five years: Report
india_trends.summary: India’s used car market is projected to double to about $70 billion by 2031 from $35 billion currently, driven by rising affordability, shorter ownership cycles and increasing demand, according to a report by Redseer Strategy Consultants.

india_trends.title: To hit $30 trillion mark by 2047, India needs 12% growth: Chief Economic Advisor V Nageswaran
india_trends.summary: Chief Economic Advisor V Anantha Nageswaran said India can reach a $30 trillion economy by 2047 if it achieves around 12% annual growth in dollar terms and strengthens its capabilities in technology and frontier research.

india_trends.title: Indian Bank expects margins to moderate in FY27 on elevated deposit costs
india_trends.summary: The state-owned lender sees steady FY27 growth but expects NIM compression as funding lags credit demand.
